permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: VeritasLens sends a short audio snippet to Google Gemini for the analysis lens you trigger (fact check, trivia, fallacy, stats, bias, translation, simplify, summary, or auto-routed). Your API key and audio leave the device only as part of that request.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: VeritasLens listens to a rolling in-memory buffer of nearby audio (30 seconds to 10 minutes, configurable). Audio is never written to disk and is dropped immediately after each analysis.
